title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: CHARNELTON COMMUNITY CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Reproductive Health (RH) Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services (including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception). Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals. 151 W 7th Avenue Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL, menopausal individuals and individuals with OHP do not qualify for the Reproductive Health Program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3550 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus routes 41 and 51 Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHARNELTON COMMUNITY CLINIC
